data.title: .test-index: three duplicate validate-phase.sh->test-residual-callers-polyglot.sh entries from RED marker removal
data.description:
## Expected Behavior
.test-index should have unique source->test mappings with no duplicate lines.

## Actual Behavior
After removing RED markers from lines 426-428, three identical entries remain:
  plugins/dso/scripts/validate-phase.sh:tests/scripts/test-residual-callers-polyglot.sh

The test-gate deduplication hook handles this at runtime, but the file is cleaner without duplicates.

## Source
Code review minor finding — not a blocking issue. Can be cleaned up in a follow-on session.
